items.title: Quiz: Can you name every FA Cup finalist since 2010?
items.summary: From the underdogs to the serial winners, can you name every FA Cup finalist since 2010?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Spurs win again on Wembanyama's play-off return
items.summary: Victor Wembanyama makes a triumphant return for the San Antonio Spurs to help them to the brink of a series victory in the NBA play-offs.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Why the third umpire was spot on to give Raghuvanshi obstructing the field
items.summary: Rohan Pandit had to establish two things: did Raghuvanshi change direction significantly and did he do it without probable cause?
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
